programme.title: A Haunting: Wicked Eviction
programme.desc: Tammy Shea, a single mother of three, relocates her family for a fresh start but her dream turns to a nightmare when her family is antagonized by multiple entities. Desperate, Tammy finds a paranormal team who reveal the true evil in the home.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: Cybermutt
programme.desc: The powerful dog Rex is injured by a car while rescuing a young scientist from being run over. Feeling responsible for the condition of Rex the scientist uses his skill as a prosthetics inventor to give the dog a new, super-power body.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: Freddy Got Fingered
programme.desc: A man is forced to move back in with his parent's and then refuses to leave.

programme.title: Joe Somebody
programme.desc: Tim Allen is Joe, a guy whose life has been steadily changing for the worse. When the office bully goes too far, Joe decides it's time to turn himself from a nobody into a somebody.

programme.title: Groomzilla
programme.desc: A woman is surprised and dismayed when her fiance takes the planning of their wedding too seriously.

programme.title: In A Day
programme.desc: A young woman spends a curiously unpredictable day with a stranger.

programme.title: P'tang Yang Klipperbang
programme.desc: Alan is a socially awkward 14 year old who is obsessed Ann Lawton, a girl in his class. He becomes friends with the groundsman Tommy, whom he sees as some sort of war hero.

programme.title: Jabberwocky
programme.desc: A young peasant, with no interest in adventure or fortune, is mistaken as the kingdom's only hope when a horrible monster threatens the countryside.

programme.title: P'tang Yang Klipperbang
programme.desc: Alan is a socially awkward 14 year old who is obsessed Ann Lawton, a girl in his class. He becomes friends with the groundsman Tommy, whom he sees as some sort of war hero.

programme.title: Young Guns
programme.desc: In a lawless and violent time, six young outcasts are hired by an English merchant as 'regulators' to guard his ranch against the mob, a corrupt and powerful ring.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Plague Carrier
programme.desc: Earp and Dr. McCarty urge a doctor to open a practice in Dodge City but when smallpox breaks out they learn he isn't licensed.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: A Murderer's Return
programme.desc: Convict Dobie Jenner arrives in Tombstone after being released from Yuma prison for murder. When his old mining partner George McKean sees him in town, he tells Earp to run Jenner out of town

programme.title: Invitation To A Gunfighter
programme.desc: In New Mexico, a Confederate veteran returns home to find his fiancée married to a Union soldier, his Yankee neighbors rallied against him and his property sold by the local banker who then hires a gunman to kill him.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Fort Bowie: Urgent
programme.desc: Officials rush to send word to a bride that an escaped criminal wants to stop her wedding.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Quest For Akhenatens Tomb
programme.desc: Jack Hunter is abducted blindfolded to a Turkish US base to be recruited by the NSA, told his mentor was killed because Albert Littmann's Russian mob employer Doridanov want the ancient Osiris-weapon.

programme.title: Banana Joe: Banana Joe
programme.desc: A man is living happily on an island with his family, growing bananas. When a local mobster with an eye on man's property tries to take it from him, he must go to the town for the first time to get some help.

programme.title: Gleaming The Cube
programme.desc: A young avid skateboarder uncovers a conspiracy while investigating his adoptive brother's mysterious death.

programme.title: Black Bear
programme.desc: In search of solace at a remote lake house, a filmmaker (Aubrey Plaza) pursues a new work of art through a calculated game of desire and jealousy.

programme.title: Watching Over You
programme.desc: Single mom Sarah moves into the suburbs and starts dating a firefighter, only to find herself the target of an obsessive neighborhood watchman who aims to prove he’s the best man to protect her… even if he has to create the danger himself.

programme.title: Strange But True
programme.desc: Five years after the tragic death of her boyfriend, a woman arrives on the doorstep of his family claiming she is pregnant with his child.

programme.title: Tornado Warning
programme.desc: Aliens attack Earth, using deadly electrical tornadoes as weapons. A farmer, his brilliant high school daughter, and a tornado blogger race against the clock to find a way to thwart the horrific invasion.

programme.title: Robot Apocalypse
programme.desc: When expert hacker Tara tries to stop a powerful, sentient A.I. as it takes over the world's military, the A.I. marks her as a terrorist.

programme.title: Apocalypse of Ice
programme.desc: Already in the throes of a viral pandemic, a massive polar vortex threatens to cover nearly all of Earth in ice.

programme.title: Not to Forget
programme.desc: After a life of little scams, a self-centered millennial is sentenced to take care of his grandmother, who is affected by Alzheimer's. As he realizes the extent of her wealth, the protagonist gets closer to the treasure he's been looking for.

programme.title: The Lost Medallion
programme.desc: Billy Stone and Allie, two 13-year-old friends, uncover a long-lost medallion and accidentally wish themselves back in time. In order for Billy to save Allie's life, he must give up the medallion to the evil warlord, Cobra, who rules the island.

programme.title: Bogus
programme.desc: When 7-year-old Albert's mother is suddenly killed in an auto accident, he and his imaginary French friend "Bogus" take up residence with his no-nonsense aunt Harriet.

programme.title: White Zombie
programme.desc: A young man turns to a witch doctor to lure the woman he loves away from her fiancé, but instead turns her into a zombie slave.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Queen Bee
programme.desc: Dracula infiltrates the Queen Bee's hive in an effort to thwart a worldwide bee invasion.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Queen Bee
programme.desc: Dracula infiltrates the Queen Bee's hive in an effort to thwart a worldwide bee invasion.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Mr. Mephisto
programme.desc: Confusion abounds when Mr. Mephisto replaces Mayor Goldwyn with a lookalike doll who spouts off radical opinions.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Tickler
programme.desc: The Tickler passes off counterfeit bills in an attempt to lure the Monster Squad into a trap.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Ringmaster
programme.desc: The Ringmaster holds children hostage as part of a larger scheme to buy out and close down all of the toy stores in America.

programme.title: Monster Squad
programme.desc: Frank and Dracula sign up for music lessons in an attempt to foil the mad musicians who robbed a telethon.

programme.title: Monster Squad: No Face
programme.desc: Mayor Goldwyn gives the deed to the city to Chief Running Nose, and then he declares all crime legal. Before long, the Monster Squad discovers No Face has been masquerading as both of them.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Astrologer
programme.desc: During a newscast, The Astrologer announces that an earthquake is about to devastate the land, and to ensure his prediction comes true, he makes plans to detonate an atomic bomb.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Get Me Out of Here!
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when a fraternity prank goes awry on Halloween and a pledge master is left for dead in an open grave.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Crushed
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when news of a high school house party goes viral, resulting in overcrowding, a collapsed porch, and a teenage girl’s death.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Two people are killed with a gun printed from a computer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team use the art of interrogation when a beloved off-duty NYPD officer dies.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates when a masked man is found at the bottom of a skyscraper.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigate what appears to be a fatal car-jacking.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Bone Voyage
programme.desc: Horatio Caine calls Las Vegas CSI Dr. Ray Langston to come to Miami when a severed leg found in the Everglades is discovered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Point of Impact
programme.desc: When Horatio and the CSI team investigate who or what caused a horrific car accident, both drivers' darkest secrets are revealed.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a bottle girl is murdered at an exclusive club, Horatio must look at Miami's elite.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a reality TV star dies at a premiere, each of her co-stars becomes a suspect.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team recreate a crime scene that has been washed away.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A roller derby arena provides the backdrop for a grisly crime.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A teenage boy shoots up LVPD headquarters and holds Russell hostage.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Sara's fate remains in question as the CSI team rushes to find out if she survived an attack by the miniature killer, on the eighth season premiere.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates two unusual cases, one involving the suspicious death of a go-cart racer who took his hobby to the highway and paid the price with his life, and a murder at a hip new restaurant where patrons dine in the dark.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of an entire family, except for one daughter, who supposedly is possessed by the devil.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover a young man strangled to death by hanging ...whose body looks like that of a woman.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team goes behind the scenes at a horror porn film studio to investigate the murder of a slasher film actress murdered on the set of one of her movies.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: In Part One of a Two-Part crossover episode to conclude on Without A Trace, a kidnap victim from New York who went missing six years ago may be the same boy whose death Grissom and the CSI team are investigating in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Bunker Games
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must work with Toby's nemesis, Quincy Berkstead and his wife, Amy , when they are locked inside an artificially intelligent doomsday bunker that aims to kill them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Lighthouse of the Rising Sun
programme.desc: A solar storm knocks out power in Los Angeles, and Team Scorpion must help a teen pilot and his girlfriend who are lost over the Pacific without navigation or radio contact.

programme.title: Scorpion: Wave Goodbye
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must prevent an incoming tsunami from hitting a vulnerable nuclear power facility, and Toby secretly helps his ex-fiancée retrieve her stolen identity.

programme.title: Scorpion: Nerd, Wind and Fire
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, Team Scorpion must set aside their romantic plans to help a doctor and pilot trapped inside a helicopter that crashed atop a skyscraper.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dumbster Fire
programme.desc: The geniuses of Team Scorpion turn into knuckleheads and Paige must simplify the science for them, when their mental faculties are impaired during a job to prevent the creation of a black hole.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dork Day Afternoon
programme.desc: Team Scorpion inadvertently crashes a bank robbery in progress and is taken hostage. Also, Sylvester's feelings for Florence grow.

programme.title: The Family
programme.desc: After snitching on the mob, a Mafia boss (Robert De Niro) and his family enter the Witness Protection Program and relocate to a sleepy town in France, but their insistence on resorting to their old habits places them in danger from vengeful cronies.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's A Madea Christmas
programme.desc: Madea (Tyler Perry) accompanies her niece to the country for a surprise holiday visit with the niece's daughter, but what they find when they arrive prompts Madea to dish out her own brand of Christmas spirit.

programme.title: Boo! A Madea Halloween
programme.desc: Cranky, fast-talking Madea (Tyler Perry) finds herself under attack from ghosts, ghouls and zombies after breaking up a fraternity's Halloween party.

programme.title: Hunted
programme.desc: An unusual relationship develops between a fugitive killer and a runaway orphan on an odyssey across England.

programme.title: A Window in London
programme.desc: On his way to work, a man looks through the window of his train where he sees a young woman's murder.

programme.title: Checkpoint
programme.desc: The agent of an auto industrialist is sent to Italy to lure an Italian designer away from his firm. However, the plan goes wrong and leads to theft, corruption and even murder.

programme.title: Blithe Spirit
programme.desc: A widower's second marriage is complicated by his first wife's disruptive ghost. Based on the play by Noel Coward.

programme.title: Medium: The Devil Inside, Part One
programme.desc: A man named Lucas Harvey is stalking Allison, convinced that he's doing the work of God by getting rid of her and her ability.

programme.title: Medium: The Devil Inside, Part Two
programme.desc: Allison continues to be tormented by Lucas Harvey, her obsessed stalker. Harvey corrupts Allison's dreams, making her unhelpful to Devalos and Scanlon during a serial murderer case.

programme.title: Medium: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 1
programme.desc: Allison leaves her job at the D.A.'s office after she's recruited to work for the Lydecker Corporation by another psychic who works there. While enjoying her new job, Allison still regrets leaving the D.A.'s office so suddenly.

programme.title: Medium: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 2
programme.desc: While at her new job at the Lydecker Corporation, Allison shares the dreams she's been having of the serial killer in Phoenix with Devalos and Scanlon.

programme.title: Medium: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 3
programme.desc: Allison struggles with her decision to switch jobs. When she continues to have visions about a serial killer she is forced to choose between honoring the contract with her new job and sharing her information with the police.

programme.title: Medium: The Man In The Mirror
programme.desc: After falling into a coma during an investigation, Allison's spirit finds it's way into the body of a man named Todd Emory. Joe and the kids have to adjust to living with Allison's spirit in the body of Todd, who insists on living with them.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When a young girl calls 911 to report an intruder, the SRU's arrive to find the girl's mother shot and the girl abducted.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A museum gala shooting spree brings the SRU's actions into question.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When gunmen prevent team one from helping at a bus crash, spike cannot believe his former mentor might be involved

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU’s plan to take down a hostage holding gunman who is convinced that a restaurant owner is planning a terror attack.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU's attempt to take down a crime boss, but when the plan is botched, the boss flees, taking his girlfriend, a criminal Informant, with him.

programme.title: God's Not Dead
programme.desc: College philosophy professor Mr. Radisson's curriculum is challenged by his new student, Josh, who believes God exists. Starring:Shane Harper, Kevin Sorbo, David A.R. White

programme.title: Benji
programme.desc: Two school kids strike up a friendship with an orphaned puppy named Benji. When danger befalls them and they end up kidnapped by robbers who are in over their heads, Benji and his scruffy sidekick come to the rescue.

programme.title: Seize The Day
programme.desc: Tommy Wilhelm is a good honest man who's fallen on hard times after losing his job, but what really gets to Tommy is seeing both his friends and family turning their backs on him one after the other. He tries to seize the day - in vain.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Gone Fishin' / A Little Body of Work
programme.desc: Young Randy is reluctant to accompany his Uncle Ned on a fishing trip. / Delinquents Eddie and Herman have a bad habit of stealing parts for their hot rod from cars on the street.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: The Sleeping Beauty
programme.desc: Self-centered and conceited Prince Charming has only two goals in life: to look maahvelous, daaahling, and to reach the castle of Sleeping Beauty in order to kiss her out of her spell.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: The Works In Wax
programme.desc: Craig and William are just about the only two people left who care about Rottmucker's Wax Museum and its collection of classic monsters.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: The Works In Wax
programme.desc: Craig and William are just about the only two people left who care about Rottmucker's Wax Museum and its collection of classic monsters.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Cave Man
programme.desc: Young Peter's birthday is coming up, and he's looking forward to spending the weekend with his overworked father, a scientist at the local museum.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Hyde and Go Shriek

programme.desc: Best friends Camille and Mildred are obsessed with monsters and vampires.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: This Wraps it Up

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Grounds for Horror

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Ghost Ship
programme.desc: Radical surf dudes Mike and Ben decide to take Ben's father's most bodacious speedboat for a spin - without permission.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives: For Love Or Money
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Presumed Dead
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay puts aside the battle of the sexes and switches the chefs to even out the teams. The teams are put to the test during a lunch service cooking for a group of highly demanding customers.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: On the restaurant's fifth night, Chef Gordon Ramsay has the contestants make and serve an entire Italian-themed menu.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: As the teams prepare for their sixth dinner, chef Ramsay tells them that each team must create its own menu.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The wannabe chefs must combine their skills and work as individuals for the first time. The prize is a trip with Chef Ramsay to get a taste of the restaurant at the Red Rock Casino Resort.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining contestants must create a meal fit for service in 15 minutes out of a tray of leftovers from the previous night.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Blood Sport: The Bondi Gay Murders
programme.desc: In the late 1980s and early 1990s a series of violent murders took place near Sydney’s famous Bondi Beach.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Death in a Heartbeat / The Body in the Bag
programme.desc: CI examines the Dr. Victor Chang extortion murder as well as the horrific Jane Doe Case where a girl is found lying on the side of the road of an inner Sydney suburb wrapped in two plastic garbage bags.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Thrill Kill: The Janine Balding Murder
programme.desc: On a September night in 1986, two police officers climbed through a barbed-wire fence beside the F4 freeway at Minchinbury in Sydney’s west.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Disappearance of Donald Mackay
programme.desc: A small group of local criminals with mafia connections were making vast fortunes in the famous NSW Riverina irrigation district from marijuana plantations.

programme.title: Operation Repo: Off the Hitch
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy get the worst service ever from a street-side coffee vendor who won't give up his truck. Then, Froy and Lyndah confront a failed actor who has abandoned his dream and his responsibility for his car payments. Finally, it's death...

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Easy Rider
programme.desc: What looks like a routine pick-up turns into a complicated case of betrayal, deceit, as well as quality nail care as Dog and company track down a fugitive alleged to be an abusive boyfriend with one too many friends in his close knit community.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Midnight Run
programme.desc: This fugitive has a bad reputation and a knack for running from the law. The pursuit has Dog and team traveling through an urban dystopia of suspicion, false leads and mistrust.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Hunt for Santa
programme.desc: Dog decides he needs to help his son Garry believe in Santa Claus again. So now the Dog, with a posse expanded to include his children and grandchildren, sets off on a hunt through the Colorado Rockies for Santa Claus himself!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Call Waiting
programme.desc: Dog's target for today has been in trouble with the law since he was a juvenile. And he seems willing to use any trick in the system to avoid capture by Dog. In this match of wits, will Dog prevail?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Kid Stuff
programme.desc: A fugitive from justice is on the lam and it's Dog's job to find him. When they hit the last known address they discover he already has pulled up stakes and left no forwarding address. The posse's one hope is to locate his girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Easy Does It
programme.desc: There is a running joke in the posse that every time Bobby Brown asks them for help with a fugitive, he always promises them it's "an easy one," but the hunts end up being epic searches.

programme.title: The Game: Psh!! I'm Good!!
programme.desc: Blue attempts to apologize to Keira and is spurned when he learns of a visit from a "co-worker." In an attempt to get over his frustration, he takes up Malik's offer to go out for a night on the town and join him.

programme.title: The Game: A Swan Song For Rick And Tasha...
programme.desc: After getting back together, Blue and Keira run into a slight problem when Blue starts to believe that their relationship is contributing to his poor performance.

programme.title: Run's House: Blog Wild
programme.desc: Rev tricks the girls into coming back East for work so that he and Justine can spend time with them. JoJo helps Diggy bring more traffic to his blog.

programme.title: Run's House: Tapper's Delight
programme.desc: Vanessa and Angela nurture Russy's new passion: tap dancing. Diggy plays his sisters into getting him a mini-fridge for his bedroom. Rev tries to babyproof the house.

programme.title: Run's House: An Office He Can't Refuse
programme.desc: Rev tries to become an office worker at the remarkable Global Grind. Diggy's clean freak behavior borders on germaphobia.

programme.title: Run's House: Mother Smother
programme.desc: Diggy and Russy get annoyed by their Mom getting in their business while older siblings Angela and Vanessa don't mind Justine's ways. JoJo helps Rev find a new wardrobe.

programme.title: Run's House: The Puppy Whisperer
programme.desc: Justine and the boys try to train their dog Pal to convince Rev they're worthy of another dog. JoJo cooks healthy fried chicken for his parents.

programme.title: Run's House: Hall of Fame
programme.desc: Rev tries to figure out what Run DMC getting inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame is all about. Angela and Vanessa celebrate the 2-year anniversary for Pastry.

programme.title: Run's House: Series Premiere
programme.desc: Daughter Angela is graduating from high school, and Run plans to reward her for being a straight-A student and the family's "role model" by throwing her a party.

programme.title: Run's House: The Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: Run invites an emerging hip-hop band, Union Turnpike, to the house to strategize their pitch to Russell Simmons' new music label.

programme.title: Run's House: Chicks Fly the Coop
programme.desc: Run's blood boils upon finding that his backyard pool house has become filled with family junk. He vows to clean it out, which unleashes conflict with every family member who wants to hang onto some possession.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bullying Bulldog
programme.desc: Bulldog Buster is prone to biting and growling. Sadie, a 3 month old Beagle/terrier mix, is frightened of trash cans. Lacey develops anxiety at 11 years of age.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Maxwell, Brooklyn, and Tipper
programme.desc: A spoiled Welsh Sealyham Terrier has dominance issues; an excitable English Mastiff has behavioral issues, and a territorial Tibetan Terrier needs help accepting other dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Anti-Social Sasha
programme.desc: Sasha, a pound pup, is perfect in the house, but outside she shows aggression towards other dogs. Angler, a Lab, is blind, and exhibits strange behavior around food.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Sophie & Daisy
programme.desc: Sophie, a Sheltie-Golden nix, tries to nip at the heels of her owner’s horse. Daisy has an annoying problem – she tries to “hump” various members of the Benda family.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Special: 100th Episode Celebration
programme.desc: Participants from more than 200 stories featured on Dog Whisperer parade down the red carpet to celebrate the 100th Episode of Dog Whisperer with Cesar Millan.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.31
programme.desc: The emotional burial of a pet Chihuahua leads to a violent, bloody assault between family members/A woman sues her ex-fiancé for a loan to buy a home. He claims she wrecked his truck while driving drunk, so he’s not paying.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.181
programme.desc: Two 18-year-old girls accused of spray painting each other’s cars trace their alleged vandalism back to high school issues. A 'tickling' incident between young lovers causes a shoulder injury and a dispute over treatment costs.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.114
programme.desc: Man faces assault charges after altercation with son/Ex-fiancé sued for rent and unpaid loans.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.246
programme.desc: Racial slurs and violent threats emerge as a woman and her father sue a family member for incomplete home renovations. Meanwhile, friends swap cell phones, but a defective device complicates the arrangement.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.252
programme.desc: Attending a golf tournament becomes a source of contention between ex-lovers when payment for a plane ticket is challenged. When students move out of a shared apartment, their parents are left to fight over rent and damaged credit.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.33
programme.desc: Slashed tires, alleged slander on the internet, and a fight over children’s Christmas gifts come into play when ex-lovers end a rocky relationship.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.10
programme.desc: Dog breeder accused of misrepresenting breed; teacup Chihuahua weighs over 12 pounds/Underage drinking during basketball damages car, sparks liability dispute.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.39
programme.desc: Ex-lovers dispute Suzuki motorcycle purchase, crash, and cancelled insurance.Young man arrested for assault, fails drug test, violates probation, bailed out by girlfriend; he claims bailout was birthday gift.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.154
programme.desc: A man says he was thrown on top of a car by a club bouncer after being wrongfully accused of hitting someone in the bathroom. A woman sues her twin brother for allegedly drinking, driving her car without permission, and wrecking it.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.198
programme.desc: A teenager, awarded a scholarship, admits to stealing a phone and erasing contacts. Another teen is accused of urinating in ex-friend's gas tanks as a joke.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.29
programme.desc: Siblings dispute deceased grandmother's estate, personal property, and damages from alleged mutual assault/Woman sues ex-boyfriend for alleged life-threatening phone call over broken apartment lease, involving alleged marijuana and meth use.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Temptation
programme.desc: In June 2007, Dewayne Barrentine met Tausha Fields and soon after they began living together. Tausha told him some unbelievable stories about herself – leading Barrentine to verify her stories online, which resulted in the uncovering of a homicide.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Mr. Wonderful
programme.desc: Nicknamed "Mr. Wonderful" by one of his victims, Matt Mathews was everything to the women who lost both their hearts and bank accounts to the prolific con artist. Married at least 11 times, Mathews is believed to have scammed hundreds of people.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in Spokane
programme.desc: A report that focuses on the murders in Spokane, Washington over a period of a little more than two years (1997 - 1999) of at least a dozen women, mostly prostitutes.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Texas Confidential
programme.desc: A report on the 1997 murder of Doris Angleton, the wife of a successful Houston, Texas bookie. Doris’ husband Bob who claimed that his brother Roger was Doris’ killer, was tried for the crime in state court and acquitted. But the case did not end there.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Law and Mrs. Shelton
programme.desc: A report on Catherine Mehaffey Shelton, a criminal defense attorney from Dallas. She has been practicing law in Texas for nearly three decades and making headlines for nearly as long, primarily because strange things happen to the men in her life.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Raging Son
programme.desc: A cell phone captures the murder of a Weight Watchers executive by a Wall Street lawyer.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Two Thousand
programme.desc: Joe Collins is a nuclear scientist who is made to believe that he is a prisoner in the year 2000 and is about to be executed as part of the IMF's plans to learn where he has hidden enough plutonium to construct a dozen atomic bombs.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Deal
programme.desc: Robert Webber guest stars as Charles Rogan, a syndicate leader with the key to the five million dollar bankroll that will finance the overthrow the government of Camagua.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Leona
programme.desc: Robert Goulet guest stars as Joe Epic, a syndicate crime leader and key figure in an IMF plan to free a captured undercover agent.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: TOD-5
programme.desc: To locate a terrorist ring called Alpha Group, the IMF convinces turncoat intelligence agent Gordon Holt (played by guest star Peter Haskell) that he's been exposed to the stolen biological weapon he's been hired to deliver.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Cocaine
programme.desc: William Shatner guest stars as Joe Conrad, a drug dealer who becomes the unwitting dupe of the Impossible Missions Force in their plan to capture the largest shipment of cocaine ever brought into the country.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Once a Pawn a Time
programme.desc: Ton and Allen discover that owning a pawn shop is way more trouble than they expected. With bills stacking up, even an antique ammo collection and some classic football helmets may not be enough to put the guys in the black.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rock-et to Me!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen end up in a turf war at a Hollywood auction and at odds with each other over whether to gamble on what could be an antique slot machine. Allen attempts to fly a jetpack.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen vs. Ton
programme.desc: When Ton and Allen find themselves bidding against each other at an auction, the former partners battle it out in an epic showdown that leaves the fate of the pawnshop and their friendship in question.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Ton and Allen quarrel over bidding strategy at a rare auction on Catalina Island and must race against the clock to unload a one man submersible that could be worth big money… if they can make it work.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes of a Child
programme.desc: A loving, churchgoing grandmother is found stabbed to death in her apartment, leaving Joe Kenda to wonder what sort of monster could do such a thing.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Tighten the Screws
programme.desc: When young Iraq War veteran Curtis Ashley ends up dead, Lt. Joe Kenda has to solve the slaying of a seemingly innocent victim using his keen awareness of the criminal mind.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: In South Carolina, a mother and son are shot and killed on their family's estate. Detectives collect evidence at the scene and the only witness is interviewed.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana field, Brian Davis's body is found at what seems to be an attempted robbery scene. However, a timely afternoon rainstorm uncovers an elaborate plot.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: A powerful thunderstorm hits a small Illinois town overnight as a wealthy couple is shot dead in their sleep. Detectives face challenges from the weather while searching for clues, but the storm may provide unexpected leads to catch the killer.

programme.title: Killers: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: CCTV and GPS exposed Kaitlin Armstrong for Mo Wilson's murder. In the UK, CCTV and digital forensics led to Liam Smith's killers.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In San Antonio, Christopher Duncan leaves his apartment never to return home. Police have little to go on until surveillance footage offers up the possible identity of a dangerous killer.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In 2016, car salesman Hufracio Arteaga was found stabbed to death in his Michigan City office, and surveillance cameras from a nearby building could potentially help investigators reveal the killer.

programme.title: Murder in the Family: Kelsey Grammer
programme.desc: Kelsey Grammer was 14 when his father was murdered, but he would face a far greater tragedy.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Ronald Glenn West: The 22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: When two suburban housewives are killed in their homes within a week of each other in May 1970, it leaves Toronto in fear.

programme.title: Crime Stories: William Fyfe: The Killer Handyman
programme.desc: A man who was once accepted into a small Quebec community turns out to be a murderer, whose crimes cover nearly twenty years.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Casebook Rapist
programme.desc: An international student is found raped and murdered in the bathroom of her high-rise apartment.

programme.title: Crime Stories: David Shearing: The Wells Grey Gunman
programme.desc: In August of 1982, six members of the Bentley/Johnson family disappear in the Wells Grey National Park without a trace.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Menthol Murderer
programme.desc: A week-long search for a missing 10-yr-old Indiana girl ends sadly with her body being discovered in a nearby stream.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a college girl is reported missing, police believe she may have just wandered off, but they are forced to reassess when blood is found in her boyfriend's bedroom.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Texas police hunt frantically for a brutal rapist. No one knows where he'll strike next, but given the increasingly violent nature of his crimes, he must be found soon.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A sixteen-year-old girl was killed by her mother and father, in her own home. Her parents said they acted in self-defence, but the forensic evidence indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A mysterious computer bug pushes a thriving company to the brink of collapse. Can forensic investigators determine if the crash was the result of sabotage?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: During a routine motorcade for the Queen's US visit, two security cars collide and agents are killed. Investigators reach different conclusions as to the cause of the crash.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 1993, an Amtrak train crashed, crossing Alabama's Bayou Canot bridge. Forty-seven passengers and crew were killed. Investigators hunt for clues as to the cause of the crash.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a fire erupted at King's Cross Underground, investigators were able to pinpoint the cause. Could they explain why it became a blazing inferno, killing 31 people?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A discarded sleeping bag, containing bloody sneakers and a purse, leads police to the body of a young woman. The autopsy and crime scene were analysed, but it would be a mark found on the victim's body that would enable police to track the killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is killed while walking her dogs in the woods. She has no enemies and her husband has an alibi, so police assume it was a hunting accident until a strange letter turns up, allegedly written by the woman before her death.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The discovery of vital evidence, more than 2,000 miles away from a murder victim's body, helps detectives piece together the case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.title: Pointless: Episode 64
programme.desc: The brainy quiz returns for a tenth series in which contestants try to score as few points as possible by plumbing the depths of their general knowledge to come up with the answers no-one else could think of.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Digital forensics, traditional police work and a good old fashioned stake out stop a killer in his tracks, when all he's left is a digital trace.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the 35-year investigation and forensic advances that identify Rosa's savage killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of a sadistic crime and how investigators brought the merciless attacker to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The investigation to catch a serial rapist and how advanced DNA technology finally tracked him down.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Dogs enter the ring as they munch and crunch their way into victory. Some will let off steam while others sends out flames of destruction.

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Documentary profile of Patrick Mackay, once dubbed the most dangerous man in Britain. In the mid 1970s, London and the south east was gripped by a series of bizarre murders.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Charles Albright is suspected to have brutally murdered three women in Dallas' red light district.

programme.title: Born to Kill?

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: A look at the murders of Richard Ramirez, who slept in cemeteries as a child and later spread terror in LA by killing, and often raping, over 14 victims.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Examining the chilling case of Sean Gillis who stalked, raped and brutally murdered eight women.

programme.desc: After sustaining serious injuries, Aang awakens to find himself aboard a Fire Nation ship. Meanwhile, Zuko journeys home.

programme.desc: Three suspects arrested following pursuit, foot chase in Sepulveda Pass.

programme.title: Car Chase
programme.desc: Los Angeles Police chase a stolen vehicle suspect.

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Emma has a tiny bush baby that needs round-the-clock care. Jenna and Sean are forced to stop elephant research for the day as a bush fire comes perilously close to destroying their home. Annie and Lisa undertake a vital rhino collaring procedure.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A green turtle epidemic in far north Queensland is distressing the locals, who are finding the marine reptiles stranded on the beach.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: This time we get to see Hope who travels to the Arctic where wildlife rehabilitation is unusual. We talk about very serious questions in the middle of the climate change - and see whether polar bears have a chance in a melting world.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: The first fawn of the year arrives at the rehab centre; two volunteers plan to make rehab a lifelong commitment.

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Vets and volunteers rescue and rehabilitate animals in South Africa. Emily has a close call with a lion. Harriet hunts for an elephant. A baby rhino isn't putting on enough weight.

programme.title: Douze Points
programme.desc: TJ, a proud openly gay Muslim singer from Paris, is finally going to fulfil his dream of representing France in Europe's biggest song contest.

programme.title: Douze Points
programme.desc: TJ, a proud openly gay Muslim singer from Paris, is finally going to fulfil his dream of representing France in Europe's biggest song contest.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: In round two of the semifinals, competitors including Jessie Graff, Najee Richardson, Joe Moravsky and Meagan Martin face up to 10 brutal obstacles, including the dizzying Corkscrew, the Salmon Ladder and the Dungeon.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The competition moves into the Finals round with a two-night event to determine this season's champion as 28 top ninjas face up to 10 diabolical obstacles, including Falling Shelves and Dragonback, which are new to the course this year.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The competition intensifies as the remaining ninjas take their shot at the finals course, and the elite few who move on to the top eight compete in a playoff bracket where they race head-to-head on the Power Tower to determine the winner of $100,000.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Moors Murders
programme.desc: An investigation into the Moors Murderers, Myra Hindley and Ian Brady, with interviews with the family of Keith Bennett.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Jill Dando
programme.desc: Documentary examining the unsolved murder of British TV presenter and newsreader Jill Dando, who was shot outside her house in Fulham, London, in 1999.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Manchester
programme.desc: The series returns to take a closer look at the most horrific crimes ever committed on British soil, starting with the May 2017 Manchester Arena bombing.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Beverly Allitt
programme.desc: Beverley Allitt was thought to be a 'model' nurse. Very astute, caring and always willing to help, why did she murder four children and attempt to kill 11 others?

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Keith Blakelock
programme.desc: In 1985, PC Keith Blakelock was murdered during a riot on a housing estate in London, triggered after a black woman died of heart failure during a house search. Nobody has been brought to justice for his murder, despite three investigations.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Joanne Dennehy
programme.desc: Dermot Murnaghan returns to uncover the truth behind the horrific crimes of Peterborough serial killer Joanna Dennehy.

programme.title: Wildest India: The Himalayas: Surviving the Summits
programme.desc: The Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India. he Himalayas' rugged highlands offer little direct refuge to humans, in the shadow below, over a billion people in India rely on the mountains for survival.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Lake Turkana: Land of the Crocodile
programme.desc: The largest of Africa's Rift valley lakes, Lake Turkana is at the heart of one of the harshest landscapes on the planet. Despite its hostile environment, man and beast have both worked out a way to survive.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Sri Lanka: Monsoon Island
programme.desc: Lying like a teardrop in the Indian Ocean, Sri Lanka is an island that defies convention. Poised just six degrees above the equator, it's less than 75,000 km sq in size. But it has enough wildlife to rival a continent.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Pantanal: Brazil's Wild Heart
programme.desc: Every year the Pantanal is drowned by immense floods, and then suffer severe drought. Yet, while people struggle, the Pantanal hosts some of the greatest gatherings of animals on the planet.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Red Desert
programme.desc: In this episode of Wild Places, we join botanist Peter Latz, who believes the biggest influence on the Australian arid landscape has been fire. Years ago, Peter wondered how different this country would have looked like without the influence of it.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork and The Family Reunion
programme.desc: When Mindy eats one of Mork's gourmet delights, she turns into a wacky Orkan herself, sending her family reunion into a rollicking tizzy and treating pompous old Uncle Dave (special guest star Jonathan Winters) to a bizarre evening he won't forget.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: I Heard It Through The Morkvine
programme.desc: Mork, who doesn't understand why people gossip, reveals some hilarious inside scoops when he shows and tells all about his friends while subbing for Mindy as host of a local TV show called Rumor Has It.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mindy and Mork
programme.desc: When Mindy has to work long hours on a new TV call-in show, Mork has to help with the housework. But when his comedic cleaning efforts turn the apartment into a disaster area, he calls up Mindy, on the air, for a new set of instructions.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Regrets and Reflections
programme.desc: Mr. Bickley's 50th birthday celebration turns into a crazy exchange of everybody's deepest secrets, but Mindy waits until the group leaves to tell Mork somthing she's wanted to say for years.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: The Wedding
programme.desc: Mindy is the beautiful bride and Mork is the outrageously funny groom - who may not be able to fit into his tuxedo if he can't convince Orson to approve the marriage and undo his transformation of Mork into an English sheep dog.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Three The Hard Way
programme.desc: Mork and unsuspecting Mindy hatch a comedy plot that's bigger than both of them when an egg emerges from Mork's navel that grows and grows until it bursts open and out pops their full-grown, middle-aged-looking son.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mama Mork, Papa Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy is dazed at the reality that she and Mork are the parents of Mearth -half-earthling/half-orkan with the body of a 50-year-old and the mind of an infant and feels lef t out when Mearth accepts Mork as his mommy.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: PS 2001
programme.desc: Mearth hates his first day of school on planet Ork so much that Mork and Mindy accompany him back to Ork Prep, where Mork's ancient teacher - who looks like a child - is still sternly in charge.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Metamorphosis - The TV Show
programme.desc: Mindy, already worried about losing her job at the television station, foresees disaster when Mork and Mearth accidentally transfer minds, forcing her to take Mearth in Mork’s body to meet the new boss.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard investigates claims that the supposed mastermind behind the 9/11 terrorist attacks and leader of the Al Qaeda terrorist cell remained a CIA asset until his death.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with two investigative journalists and a natural health practitioner who maintain vaccines are neither safe nor effective.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Can radiation from electrical appliances, power lines, microwave ovens, and wireless technology such as cell phones, baby monitors, alter our DNA, and cause illnesses?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Richard speaks with two alleged alien abductees about their claims they were taken aboard an alien space craft.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets the owners of an abnormal humanoid skull allegedly discovered in Mexico in the 1930s and a researcher who has had the skull subjected to numerous tests including carbon-14 dating, and DNA in order to determine it’s origin.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Mystery of Oak Island
programme.desc: Richard investigates Canada's best-known mysteries, the Oak Island treasure. Also known as the money pit, the site has become one of the world's deepest and most costly archaeological digs.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Energy Healing
programme.desc: Several energy healers claim they are able to produce spontaneous miraculous healing through a laying on of hands. Claims of similar such healing by a man in a remote village in Brazil, known as John of God are also examined.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Execution of MLK and The Framing of James Earl Ray
programme.desc: In this re-examination of the assassination of civil rights leader Martin Luther King, Richard meets several researchers who provide evidence that the convicted gunman, James Earl Ray was not the real triggerman.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Birthers - Obama's Birth Certificate
programme.desc: Richard interviews several prominent 'Birthers' who present evidence that proves Barack Obama is not eligible to be President because he does not meet the qualifications of a natural born citizen.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: Herbert Armstrong, convicted in 1922 of murdering his wife, he was the first and only solicitor to be hung in UK. But was he guilty?

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Museum of Anthropology, Mexico City
programme.desc: From ancient athletes who kick a severed head to a peasant dress that brings down an empire, discover the secrets inside the National Museum of Anthropology.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums, Berlin
programme.desc: From Vikings who break unbreakable swords to curators who solve the world’s hardest jigsaw puzzle, discover the secrets inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum, Vienna
programme.desc: From the alchemy of turning silver into gold to a dance craze that changed history, discover the secrets inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Palacio Real, Madrid
programme.desc: From a clock that runs on witchcraft to a 21st Century king who outfoxes a fascist, discover the secrets inside the Palacio Real.

programme.title: Naked Science: Making Mountains
programme.desc: The Rockies. Magnificent and awe-inspiring mysterious, the Rockies are one of the longest mountain ranges in the world. Naked Science investigates the geological processes that build these massive mountains.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Italia Wild
programme.desc: In Italy, George studies avalanches of Dolomite Mountains, meets engineers who keep Venice from sinking, and heads South to explore Italy's explosive volcanoes: Vesuvius, Etna and Stromboli.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Boiling Lake
programme.desc: Tucked away, high in the mountains of the Caribbean island of Dominica lies a marvel of nature  a lake whose water literally boils and steams like a witch's cauldron.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Blizzards
programme.desc: Winter weather can be even more dangerous than thunderstorms and where else to explore the big chill than at the summit of Mount Washington which has the reputation as being the place with the "Worst weather in the world".

programme.title: Angry Planet: Desert Monsoon
programme.desc: Enlisting the help of fellow storm chaser R.J. Evans, George heads to Arizona to photograph spectacular lightning storms triggered by the desert monsoon season. R.J. however is known as "America's noisiest athiest" for his free-thought radio show.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Monsoon
programme.desc: In India's monsoon season George wades through waist-deep water in Bombay and leach-filled waterfalls in Goa, finds people being swept away by rivers, and rebuilding bridges. He experiences an intense annual Hindu celebration.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Venezuela Lightning
programme.desc: Gas from Catatumbo swamps mixed with cold air from the Andes create a perpetual lightning storm on South America's largest lake. From here George canoes 84 km to world's highest waterfall, swims with piranhas and holds a huge Anaconda.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Timbuktu: Birthplace of Hurricanes
programme.desc: Dust storms can spin off from Africa into the Atlantic and morph into tropical hurricanes that threaten the Caribbean and USA. While searching for Timbuktu's dust storms, George finds adventure in the landscape and culture of West Africa.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Defying Gravity
programme.desc: George experiences extremes of aviation and space training aboard Czech-built Albatross fighter jet, inside Zero-G plane, simulating zero gravity by diving 30,000 feet in giant parabolas and in spinning centrifuges producing 6 G's of force.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Cold War & The Start of the Space Race - Cold War rivalry and the acceleration of space exploration. Servicing Hubble - Preparations for Hubble's final servicing mission. Chasing a Comet - Launch and the difficult path to rendezvous.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Mercury Begins - The start of NASA & America's first manned space program. Mars Express - The European Space Agency's Mars Satellite. The Soyuz Launch System - The gradual evolution of Russia's Soyuz launcher.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Rebuilding Project Apollo - After the Apollo 1 disaster NASA resumes manned space flight. Orbiting Carbon Observatory 2 - Monitoring the Earth's Co2 levels in unprecedented detail. Zero Gravity Training - Parabolic flights.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Beginning of the End - After the first Moon landing the Apollo science program was about to start in earnest but people were losing interest. Apollo Gets Complicated - New technology is added that extends the reach of the Apollo program.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Beyond Earth Orbit - The Apollo program takes bold new steps. IXV Re-entry Vehicle - Europe is working to perfect a re-entry vehicle. Galileo Satellites Lost and Found - Navigation satellites go into incorrect orbit.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini Commences - Did Gemini give the US a lead in the space race? Venus Express - The last days of ESA's Venus probe. EMU - NASA's Extravehicular Mobility Unit. Deep Space Communications - ESA's worldwide network of giant dishes.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Mercury Advances - America's first manned space program finally puts a man in orbit. Camera Tracking - The array of special cameras that follow a spacecraft at launch. The International Space Station - The building and operation.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Apollo Program Begins - At the very beginning of NASA's moon project things go wrong. Caves - ESA's special training program for astronauts. Planck - Mapping the cosmic microwave background radiation.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Shuttle Program - The first re-useable spacecraft. The Challenger Disaster - Pressing launch schedules lead to carelessness and the loss of the Challenger. Return to Space - A re-designed shuttle is back in space with a redefined role.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Space Shuttle Matures - The Space Transportation System changes the nature of orbital missions. Complex Construction in Space - Confidence in the shuttle begins to return and engineers for get the lessons of the past.

programme.title: The Story of Europe: Beliefs and Ideas
programme.desc: For many Europeans, Europe today is synonymous with the "Christian Occident". But like so much of what has shaped our civilization, Christianity also comes from the Orient.

programme.title: The Story of Europe: Ambitions and Conquests
programme.desc: From the 15th to well into the 20th century, Europeans conquered and dominated the world.

programme.title: The Story of Europe: Achievements and Rewards
programme.desc: Europe's history has many dark sides, but its culture is more than a small gleam of hope, it radiates in many areas far out into the world.

programme.title: The Story of Europe: Commonalities and Division
programme.desc: Europe has been a battle concept for centuries: it often takes foreign enemies to weld the Europeans together.

programme.title: The Story of Europe: State of Play
programme.desc: Europe has never experienced such a long period of peace and prosperity as after the Second World War.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: The Tundra: Desert of Ice
programme.desc: Covering a fifth of the earth's surface, the Arctic tundra is one of the coldest places on the planet. The piercing temperatures and powerful winds challenge even the hardiest of creatures.

programme.title: Wildest Middle East
programme.desc: Wildest Middle East reveals the remotest and most surprising corners of this ancient land, where you will find nothing is as it seems and where the natural world is fighting a constant battle to survive in an ever changing world.

programme.title: Wildest Places: Australia
programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: Wild Asia: A Forest All Seasons
programme.desc: A year in the life of the temperate forest of Japan, where animals and plants must adapt to suit the variations of the climate in order to survive.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian kicks off the build with some crazy concepts.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian jumps into building the back of the car.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage

programme.title: Full Custom Garage

programme.title: Full Custom Garage

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian builds through a major issue with the roof.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian attempts to make a mold of the entire car.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian puts it all on the line to see if the custom car mold works.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian runs into issues as he attempts some last minute changes.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: In the season finale, Ian tries to bring it all together.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mano-a-Mano
programme.desc: Back in Colorado, Dog's on the hunt for a runner with more than a decade's worth of trouble with the law. But the fugitive's friends and family are reluctant to help Dog bring him in.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Road Show: Where Mercy is Shown
programme.desc: After releasing the second part of his autobiography, Dog and his family traveled across America, and this very special episode offers an intimate portrait of both the public and private moments of that journey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Comeback Kid
programme.desc: Dog is back in Colorado chasing a young man with a taste for trouble. He's fled to Texas but with his family's house on the line Dog is willing to try a risky strategy.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Tent City
programme.desc: Today's hunt takes Dog far from the glittering hotels of Waikiki to the parts of Hawaii tourist rarely see, Oahu's ramshackle tent cities. The team searches for a woman who has lost almost everything, her home, her family and her spirit.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Dead of Night
programme.desc: Dog's good friend and fellow bondsman Chris is running out of time. He has only days to find his fugitive or risk losing his business. In his hunt Dog confronts duplicitous tipsters, vicious attack dogs, and hostile neighbors.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Good Morning, West Monroe
programme.desc: After attending a local radio show as a guest, Willie sees an opportunity to host a show of his own.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Of Mattresses and Men
programme.desc: The Jase, Si and the guys from the duck call room take a field trip to a brand new local donut shop and quickly find out who amongst them can eat the most delicious treats.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Samurai Si
programme.desc: Willie receives a special gift from a Japanese business associate - a "priceless" samurai sword, which Willie keeps out of the hands of Jase and the guys.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck No, We Won't Go
programme.desc: Willie pushes his work force too far after implementing new "motivational work tactics," and the guys rise up against him and go on strike.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drag Me To Glory
programme.desc: When NASCAR sensation Clint Bowyer pays a visit to the Duck Commander warehouse, Willie and the guys are fired up to spend the day hanging out with the professional racecar driver.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Season Eve
programme.desc: Tomorrow is the opening day of Duck Season and the men are carrying on their tradition of camping on the Robertson Land the night before.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Can't Hardly Weight
programme.desc: Gearing up for his high school reunion, Willie realizes that he could stand to lose a few pounds. Jase and Korie set out to help him drop some weight and the strenuous battle of man-versus-waistline begins.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Shot Thru The Heart
programme.desc: The guys learn from Willie that John Luke is going through his first break up. In order to make him feel better the men decide to take John Luke hunting for nutria, and impart their relationship wisdom.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Here Lizard, Lizard
programme.desc: When the warehouse guys new office pet (a lizard) escapes, they try all they can in order to catch the wily reptile. Proving impossible, the guys finally decide to bring in the big guns to help trap it--Mr. Phil Robertson.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hallu-Si-Nations
programme.desc: With Willie out-of-town, the guys decide to flake off work and leave to brush up the duck blinds on the Robertson land. While out, Si believes he spots what he thinks is the infamous 'Black Panther'.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Let's Go Hunting, Deer
programme.desc: Willie and Jase invite Korie and Missy along on a deer hunt because they believe their wives have become too "city." At Phil and Kay's, Miss Kay decides she wants to frame Phil's original blueprints from the first duck call he created.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Night to Remember
programme.desc: High school seniors hope they get the dates they want for prom.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Mother and a Daughter
programme.desc: An estranged daughter is writing a vengeful expose about her mother, a much-beloved movie star.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Normal People
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark visit a halfway house for people who were confined to mental facilities but released because they were deemed no longer a danger to society.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Hero
programme.desc: A Vietnam vet is denied government assistance, despite having lost a leg and an arm.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Parents' Day
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark work as police detectives in a school. Their assignment: to investigate drug selling.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Visitations
programme.desc: Sometimes, the mysterious unidentified objects people see in the sky touch down and leave physical evidence behind.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Physical Contact
programme.desc: These are the witnesses that have been literally touched by the unknown. Do these cases hold the answer to the central question of UFOlogy?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 12
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Alien Bodies: Uncover the shocking truth about alien remains as experts investigate unsettling reports of extraterrestrial bodies recovered from crashed UFOs.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: As the world continues to evolve into the digital age, people are capturing images in the sky that they are unable to explain.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Examine the possible components of aliens' protective second layer of skin.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Triangle Terror: For years, the flying saucer has been synonymous with UFO terror. But is it still the spacecraft that frightens us the most? Or has fear taken a new shape?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 8
programme.desc: Take a fresh look at some classic alien encounters, UFOs and abductions, and discover several new stories.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Wedding
programme.desc: Krystle agrees to have her operation, but only after Blake signs her divorce papers and living will, to be enacted if the surgery is not a success; Fallon is haunted by recurring dreams of Roger Grimes.

programme.title: Dynasty: Ginger Snaps
programme.desc: Krystle's operation is unsuccessful as she slips into a coma. Told she will probably never recover, a grieving Blake returns to Denver; Sammy Jo is attacked by an unknown assailant; Dex discovers Joanna is a link to Alexis' controller, Heath.

programme.title: Dynasty: Delta Woe
programme.desc: Fearing that his darkest secret will be revealed because of the search for Roger Grimes murderer, Blake vows to take the rap to put an end to the investigation; Dex and Sable both go after Heath. Toying with Dex.

programme.title: Dynasty: Tankers, Cadavers to Chance
programme.desc: Sammy Jo recognizes Gibson as the man Krystle saw in her nightmares, and Blake vows to protect his family secret with his life; Adam discovers Virginia's secret past; Blake entrusts Dex with documents relating to their families secret.

programme.title: Dynasty: Clear the Dex
programme.desc: Alexis hires a mercenary to get her ships back; Adam and Jeff exchange blows after accuses Adam of being disloyal to Blake; Dex begins to doubt Alexis can ever offer him the kind of love he needs.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Fall of Poland
programme.desc: German tanks roll into Poland in September 1939.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Battle of Norway (Early 1940)
programme.desc: Early in the war, the Germans decide they need to guarantee access to the Norwegian port of Narvik to ensure their supplies of Swedish iron ore. The British, however, send destroyers to up-end the German plan.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Bombing of England (Fall 1940)
programme.desc: After invading France, Hitler is planning to cross the Channel. His only obstacle is the Royal Air Force. Throughout the summer of 1940, both sides lose an incredible number of daring flyers.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Tobruk
programme.desc: German field marshal Erwin Rommel scores a major victory at the Libyan seaport of Tobruk.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Operation Mercury
programme.desc: After British forces withdrew in defeat from Greece to the island of Crete in early 1941, they were soon fighting German invasion armies again. This time, 5,000 of Hitler's elite paratroopers landed to complete their conquest in the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Battle of Malta (June 1941)
programme.desc: In 1941, Mussolini desperately wants to wrest the tiny island of Malta from the British for control of the Mediterranean. When his inadequate air force fails to bomb the Maltese into submission, Hitler's Luftwaffe joins the campaign.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Fall of Singapore (October 1941)
programme.desc: Before the sneak attack on Pearl Harbor, the Japanese initiate the Pacific War by firing on the British in Malaya. Their route to the rubber-rich nation takes them into Singapore, the World's most armed fortress.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Pearl Harbor (December 7, 1941)
programme.desc: During a two-hour surprise attack on the American Pacific fleet anchored at Pearl Harbor, Japanese navy pilots score a near-complete victory.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Fall of the Philippines
programme.desc: Examining the Japanese invasion of the Philippines in December 1941.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Battle of Midway (June 2, 1942)
programme.desc: Only one isolated atoll prevents an enemy invasion of Hawaii. Midway Island is where the Japanese fleet converges on a tiny American base with a massive strafing and bombing attack.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Solana & Elijah
programme.desc: Solana is in a relationship with Danny but can't stop thinking about her online love Elijah. His photos were used in so many profiles that she has to know is this the real Elijah? (S3, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miranda & Cameryn
programme.desc: After years of online chats Miranda discovered that Cameryn was not the man he claimed to be. She confronted him only to be given another suspicious profile. Is he someone else entirely?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: When Sandra learns that her granddaughter, Yasmine, sent money to an online boyfriend, she asks Nev and Max for help. And they soon discover there's much more that Yasmine has been hiding. (S6, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Whitney & Bre
programme.desc: Whitney met Brenell on a LGBT website four years ago and is head-over-heels in love. Brenell refuses to video chat with her, and Whitney is desperate to know why. Nev and Max investigate. (S4, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: After months of intimate texts with Titus, a man she met online, Candice has decided to tell to her husband. But before she does, she asks Nev to help her find out who Titus really is! (S5, ep16)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Falesha & Jacqueline
programme.desc: Falesha's name and pictures were stolen by a fake profile that nearly ruined her life. She thought her troubles were behind her, but four years later her past comes back to haunt her. (S4, ep12)

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: As One Door Closes Another One Opens
programme.desc: One of the boys get sent home leaving the girls in tears. It all gets too much for one of the original eight. Sophie may have finally met the man of her dreams.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 121

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 210
programme.desc: DJ Danny tells his best friend Sabra about his true feelings. Travis reveals his secret crush to his best friend Kelly.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 111
programme.desc: Stephanie is tired of only fantasizing about Mike's "sexy face" and she's ready to make him her boyfriend. Sean and Kate were friends at first sight, now Sean wants to up the stakes.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 110

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 206
programme.desc: Timing is right for Spenser to reveal his feelings to his best friend Blanca. Nazzy is scared to reveal her crush on her best friend Joel.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 113
programme.desc: Kris tries to woo his best friend Lauren with a special love song. Rachel musters the courage to tell Billy how she really feels.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 217

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 101
programme.desc: Connor is in love with his best friend Brittanie and must try to convince her that he should be more than her "shopping partner." Gabby reveals her feelings to her best friend Nick.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 106

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
